issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing 'count' (5 cards), 'filter' details (should specify <Slash> attribute OR green Event), and 'remaining' action (place rest at bottom of deck in any order). Current filter is generic 'Any'.
Condition type should be 'LeaderIsName' with value 'Roronoa Zoro', not 'HasCardOnBoard'. Leader condition does not require board presence check.
Missing cost modeling: action requires resting 1 DON!! card AND this Character as payment. Current DSL has no cost/payment structure.
